message:
fix(demo): preserve ANSI styling when centering on wide terminals

The print_centered_renderable function was extracting only text content
from segments, losing all styling. Now it properly preserves styles by
working with segments directly and using console.print_segments().

Also fixes test in syntax.rs to use expect() instead of unwrap_or_default().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
